testcase.classname: Utils generateMigrationId should generate a valid migration ID with timestamp and sanitized name
testcase.name: Utils generateMigrationId should generate a valid migration ID with timestamp and sanitized name

testcase.classname: Utils generateMigrationId should handle special characters in name
testcase.name: Utils generateMigrationId should handle special characters in name

testcase.classname: Utils generateMigrationId should handle multiple spaces and dashes
testcase.name: Utils generateMigrationId should handle multiple spaces and dashes

testcase.classname: Utils ensureMigrationsDir should create directory if it does not exist
testcase.name: Utils ensureMigrationsDir should create directory if it does not exist

testcase.classname: Utils ensureMigrationsDir should not create directory if it already exists
testcase.name: Utils ensureMigrationsDir should not create directory if it already exists

testcase.classname: Utils generateMigrationTemplate should generate a valid migration template
testcase.name: Utils generateMigrationTemplate should generate a valid migration template

testcase.classname: Utils loadMigrations should return empty array if directory does not exist
testcase.name: Utils loadMigrations should return empty array if directory does not exist

testcase.classname: Utils loadMigrations should filter non-ts/js files
testcase.name: Utils loadMigrations should filter non-ts/js files

testcase.classname: Utils loadMigrations should throw error for migration without required fields
testcase.name: Utils loadMigrations should throw error for migration without required fields

testcase.classname: Extension withDataMigrations should extend prisma client
testcase.name: Extension withDataMigrations should extend prisma client

testcase.classname: Extension withDataMigrations should pass a function to $extends
testcase.name: Extension withDataMigrations should pass a function to $extends

testcase.classname: Extension extension client methods should expose $dataMigrations methods on extended client
testcase.name: Extension extension client methods should expose $dataMigrations methods on extended client

testcase.classname: Extension extension client methods should call MigrationRunner methods through extension
testcase.name: Extension extension client methods should call MigrationRunner methods through extension

testcase.classname: CLI init command should create migrations directory
testcase.name: CLI init command should create migrations directory

testcase.classname: CLI create command should generate migration file with correct naming
testcase.name: CLI create command should generate migration file with correct naming

testcase.classname: CLI status command should display migration status correctly
testcase.name: CLI status command should display migration status correctly

testcase.classname: CLI run command should execute pending migrations
testcase.name: CLI run command should execute pending migrations

testcase.classname: CLI run command should handle migration failures
testcase.name: CLI run command should handle migration failures

testcase.classname: CLI rollback command should rollback last migration
testcase.name: CLI rollback command should rollback last migration

testcase.classname: CLI rollback command should return false if no migrations to rollback
testcase.name: CLI rollback command should return false if no migrations to rollback

testcase.classname: CLI environment variables should use DATA_MIGRATIONS_DIR from environment
testcase.name: CLI environment variables should use DATA_MIGRATIONS_DIR from environment

testcase.classname: CLI environment variables should use DATA_MIGRATIONS_TABLE from environment
testcase.name: CLI environment variables should use DATA_MIGRATIONS_TABLE from environment

testcase.classname: CLI error handling should exit with error code on migration failure
testcase.name: CLI error handling should exit with error code on migration failure

testcase.classname: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should create migration table and run migrations
testcase.name: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should create migration table and run migrations

testcase.classname: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should run multiple migrations in sequence
testcase.name: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should run multiple migrations in sequence

testcase.classname: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should skip already executed migrations
testcase.name: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should skip already executed migrations

testcase.classname: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should stop on first failure and not execute subsequent migrations
testcase.name: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should stop on first failure and not execute subsequent migrations

testcase.classname: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should support rollback with down function
testcase.name: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should support rollback with down function

testcase.classname: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should return false when rolling back migration without down function
testcase.name: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should return false when rolling back migration without down function

testcase.classname: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should reset all migration records
testcase.name: Integration Tests MigrationRunner end-to-end flow should reset all migration records

testcase.classname: Integration Tests MigrationContext should provide prisma client and log function to migrations
testcase.name: Integration Tests MigrationContext should provide prisma client and log function to migrations

testcase.classname: Integration Tests Transaction handling should run migrations inside transactions
testcase.name: Integration Tests Transaction handling should run migrations inside transactions

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner ensureMigrationsTable should create table if it does not exist
testcase.name: MigrationRunner ensureMigrationsTable should create table if it does not exist

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner ensureMigrationsTable should not create table if it already exists
testcase.name: MigrationRunner ensureMigrationsTable should not create table if it already exists

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner getExecutedMigrations should return executed migrations
testcase.name: MigrationRunner getExecutedMigrations should return executed migrations

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner getExecutedMigrations should return empty array if no migrations
testcase.name: MigrationRunner getExecutedMigrations should return empty array if no migrations

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner getStatus should return correct status with pending and executed migrations
testcase.name: MigrationRunner getStatus should return correct status with pending and executed migrations

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner runMigrations should execute pending migrations
testcase.name: MigrationRunner runMigrations should execute pending migrations

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner runMigrations should stop on first failure
testcase.name: MigrationRunner runMigrations should stop on first failure

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner runMigrations should return success if no pending migrations
testcase.name: MigrationRunner runMigrations should return success if no pending migrations

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner rollbackLast should rollback the last executed migration
testcase.name: MigrationRunner rollbackLast should rollback the last executed migration

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner rollbackLast should return false if no migrations to rollback
testcase.name: MigrationRunner rollbackLast should return false if no migrations to rollback

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner rollbackLast should return false if migration has no down function
testcase.name: MigrationRunner rollbackLast should return false if migration has no down function

testcase.classname: MigrationRunner reset should clear all migration records
testcase.name: MigrationRunner reset should clear all migration records

testcase.classname: Types DataMigration interface should accept valid migration object
testcase.name: Types DataMigration interface should accept valid migration object

testcase.classname: Types DataMigration interface should accept migration without optional down function
testcase.name: Types DataMigration interface should accept migration without optional down function

testcase.classname: Types MigrationRecord interface should accept valid migration record
testcase.name: Types MigrationRecord interface should accept valid migration record

testcase.classname: Types MigrationContext interface should have required properties
testcase.name: Types MigrationContext interface should have required properties
